meta.title: Shivani Jain | Software / Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Shivani Jain, a Software / Full Stack Developer building production-level products across healthcare, sports, AI, ML, research, and prize-draw platforms.

hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the background video.
hero.description: I build production-ready digital products across healthcare, sports, finance, mobile applications, machine learning, and research.
hero.explore: Explore the products and problems I've worked on
hero.footer: Building for the web and beyond

about.title: I don't just write code. I build
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer who enjoys turning ideas into products that people actually use.
I don't get attached to technologies. I choose the right tools for the problem.

Whether it's a healthcare platform, a research project, or an enterprise application, I'm driven by solving meaningful problems, creating intuitive experiences, and continuously learning through every challenge.

cards.title: Problem First
cards.description: Every project starts with understanding the problem, not choosing the technology.

cards.title: Always Learning
cards.description: Every product teaches me something new, and I carry those lessons into the next one.

cards.title: Build End-to-End
cards.description: I enjoy taking products from idea to deployment across the entire stack.

cards.title: User Experience Matters
cards.description: Great software isn't only functional. It should feel effortless to use.

work.title: Products built around
work.intro: From international healthcare platforms to tournament ecosystems and prize-draw products, I build complete digital experiences shaped around business needs.

projects.summary: A production-ready healthcare platform independently delivered for an international client.
highlights: Built dynamic and configurable admin modules
Implemented user management and secure JWT authentication
Delivered the complete production application independently

projects.summary: A large-scale sports tournament platform covering more than 12 sports categories.
highlights: Built an organiser dashboard for complete tournament management
Supported tournament creation, ticket pricing and participant tracking
Implemented result publishing across the tournament lifecycle

projects.summary: A multi-category prize-draw platform combining commerce, payments, rewards and secure winner selection.
highlights: Built ticket cart, instant wins, gift cards, wallet and gift-credit systems
Integrated Stripe payments and multi-currency switching
Implemented compliance questions and secure winner selection from eligible tickets

projects.summary: A bilingual SaaS operations platform built for a Japanese client managing welfare, mobility support, respite activities, and day services.
highlights: Unified reservations, schedules, staff, vehicles, and service delivery workflows
Supported multiple organizations through a bilingual English and Japanese experience
Centralized incident tracking, operational reporting, and auditable activity history

experience.title: Places That Shaped Me
experience.intro: I don't measure my career by years. I measure it by products built, problems solved, and lessons carried forward.

items.lesson: Where I learned that great products begin with great user experiences.
highlights: Built responsive user interfaces using React and Next.js.
Developed reusable UI components with clean, scalable architecture.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to deliver polished, production-ready user experiences.

items.lesson: Where I grew from building features to building complete products.
highlights: Developed production-ready full-stack applications using Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Python.
Built dynamic admin dashboards, scalable APIs, and role-based access control.
Implemented server-side rendering, protected routes, and API-driven business features across multiple client projects.

research.heading: Award-winning thinking, beyond the code.
research.intro: Research taught me how to slow down, study a domain deeply, and understand technology as a force that changes real-world systems.
research.title: Real Estate Market in the Digital Age
research.subtitle: A review of technology trends and advancements shaping how real estate transactions become more efficient, transparent, and digitally enabled.
research.certificateAlt: ICRTAC 2023 Best Research Paper certificate awarded to Shivani Jain
research.contribution: Led the research process from data collection and analysis to drafting the final manuscript, strengthening my understanding of real estate systems and the technologies transforming them.
highlights: Reviewed digital technologies transforming real estate transactions.
Analyzed case studies showing practical technology implementation.
Identified future trends and potential areas of market disruption.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.description: If you're building something meaningful and think I can help, I'd love to hear about it. If it feels like the right fit for both of us, I'll be happy to continue the conversation.
contact.thanks: Thanks for taking the time to explore my work.
